description: Generic mass HR invite from a job platform — priority medium, stage screening
subject: Your profile matches our Senior Backend Engineer opening
raw_text:
Hi there,

I came across your profile and think you could be a great fit for a Senior Backend Engineer role at Acme Solutions GmbH in Berlin.

We are looking for someone with strong Python skills and experience in distributed systems.

The position offers:
- Salary: 80,000–95,000 EUR/year
- Hybrid work (2 days office)
- Berlin or remote within Germany

If you're interested, please reply to this email or apply here: https://acme-solutions.de/jobs/senior-be

Best regards,
HR Team, Acme Solutions GmbH
